heading: This Afternoon
text: Sunny, apart from a few high clouds. Highs in the mid to upper 80s. West to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mainly clear south; partly cloudy north. Lows from the upper 40s to mid 50s, except mid 50s to around 60 in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys. Winds becoming light and variable, except southwest 5 to 10 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.

heading: Friday
text: Sun filtering through increasing high clouds, mainly in the afternoon. Highs from the mid 80s to around 90, some lower 80s far north. West to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.
